feed.title: Chirpy
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive and feature-rich Jekyll theme for technical writing.

entry.title: Customize the Favicon
entry.summary: Getting Started with the Project Welcome to the “Getting Started” guide! In this article, we’ll walk you through the basics of setting up and using this project. Understanding the Setup Before you begin, let’s take a look at the setup process. You’ll need to understand how the project files are structured. This is the light mode screenshot of the setup. This is the dark mode screenshot o...

entry.title: Getting Started
entry.summary: Get started with Chirpy basics in this comprehensive overview. You will learn how to install, configure, and use your first Chirpy-based website, as well as deploy it to a web server.

entry.title: Writing a New Post
entry.summary: Getting Started with the Project Welcome to the “Getting Started” guide! In this article, we’ll walk you through the basics of setting up and using this project. Understanding the Setup Before you begin, let’s take a look at the setup process. You’ll need to understand how the project files are structured. This is the light mode screenshot of the setup. entry.title: Text and Typography
entry.summary: Examples of text, typography, math equations, diagrams, flowcharts, pictures, videos, and more.
